# 新闻速递 2026-04-25

## Coupang
- Matthews机构减持Coupang股份，反映其对公司前景的重新评估。（[News.google](https://news.google.?oc=5)）
- Coronation Fund Managers增持Coupang股份，机构投资者对其前景看好。（[News.google](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiwAFBVV95cUxQakdyREtsYi12YWhFcEJJVkFFZmtMTktHN2t2Y3dEeGlraFhLcWJpdzA1NVEyOHA3OElxUENyYVlqMDBTU2gwWHdzVHVPV3ZsZFh6dEd4cC1EN3ZPNzhxNDg5ZWlYa0ZmVEt5UjdlRm9DcTlJTHpMeGFyZkRIdU5tR1M0bkZJUkRLbDkwRGZESkdUN0dMb0VSaDNkaEZnZzZiSHVNNUtDV3NJaVVlSXRtdTNCNk9ybHM4OGppX1k5QUw?oc=5)）

## Shopee
- Shopee菲律宾站点上架汽车雨刮水泵马达，丰富商品品类以满足市场需求。（[News.google](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMid0FVX3lxTE1YdFhIZWFDWU11SkR1NEcyZEdweElwbnVrR19GRGxPblFQTEV1QTg3QXh3TDRyS3k3aEROcWcwT29jUWZPNUtjbFFLSmpDc08tOG1MSlVfS2s0Z0xWQXEzU3ZpeUYzX19qdm1peFVIREM3WWNvTFpF?oc=5)）
- Sea Limited股价结束六连跌，有望提振市场对其投资信心。（[News.google](https://news.google.?oc=5)）
- Shopee菲律宾站点上架台球杆架，进一步丰富平台产品种类。（[News.google](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMirAFBVV95cUxNU3hMMXF3QWVZZFoyWTlSbzc5UzJMSkF3c2dnYzNBZHp1VW5COUxvWkUxc0FHNWE0RVQ5Q1EwUnJjc2pIOFdnUE1iczgtQ1ZlLVNWa1FwSl9HWGlBVGMwaDdXSi12U0FIckVBaXpmT3NDYU5QZS1kbXpKMnFIcm1hbVhKb01yNzlsQ0ROaG52STRGSXJPRlo3akRLOHRnTWlTZ016dldzUzdERnkx?oc=5)）
- Sea Limited ADR股价跑赢大盘，凸显其市场韧性与投资吸引力。（[News.google](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMimAFBVV95cUxORmdhM1FWY1k3MEJURnlQcmVNaXlpVTZyUmdsN2ZyXzd1REVXbzhjUnliZHRiZVBnaHJobUduTGJUeUVqbW9Gcmw5UXpwNG1GUDVrXzBOb1VNbXdMU2treG5DYWJsSEFoTEJXeTJhcGNOX2xrN1dKWGFvTFZBa0hVSVhZVHNEd3ZTVTZPNVM1dUt3dFdXRndwMQ?oc=5)）

## MercadoLibre
- MercadoLibre在Q4在线市场股中表现亮眼，彰显其强劲的市场竞争力。（[News.google](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMipwFBVV95cUxQdVFxUTNkbGRkVDhVUGV5R3hkWUZnVFR3X0NXdmVNaDNHbl9TbldmQnd2akY0LUJmVEFKZXRYdFBUVm9yejBjZWxFbDhzUVJsV1p2eUhzRkkwRGF3Wk1YVUJ0SVJTS2RZc1ZpNkV6bG44ekt4dXQwQWszVERBd21ZeWtoX1ExeS14WWF5aXFlODkxM3BTZU0xWkFqT2N4X3N5dnJMS3l5WQ?oc=5)）
- MercadoLibre因重投资与评级下调，市场对其估值及未来走势看法复杂。（[News.google](https://news.google.?oc=5)）
- MercadoLibre股价周三大幅下跌，引发市场关注其潜在原因及后续影响。（[News.google](https://news.google.?oc=5)）

## AppLovin
- Calamos Advisors增持AppLovin股份，表明机构对其未来增长持乐观态度。（[News.google](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMixAFBVV95cUxNSUlSRUpOOWltSm9HSDJBYXNxc2tJMFhoWHV3YUkzNDZJajk0RDNwMHRXWlBlVy1aQmpqbk40QndJMVlGcEFTTjFmeXk1TjBuY1JlM0tQNnc5aW1SZC1WWE12TzgwN0lXbWlKTG11c0dvaGtaZUtOakVkbW1LT0FUYkhwUkNDb2xESklSa2VxRUoyamRDelNfZ3VKSDktajg5dktiQkVMXzdSeDV4blpuN0Zwb0ZXaHktQ3hHNER3bXBGNWtf?oc=5)）
